action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline trained in ~74 seconds with val acc 0.3026. The training curves show high train accuracy but low val accuracy - classic catastrophic forgetting. The model trains well on each task but forgets previous ones. Decision: Submit eval to get baseline score, then improve with better CL strategy (larger memory, more epochs, better replay).
